claim: Commodity futures curve structure (backwardation/contango) is a leading indicator of vol regime shifts
needs: False positive calibration across full backwardation history; resolution of the 2020 exception (decade's largest vol event with no backwardation signal); independent agent corroboration; separation of necessary vs sufficient conditions for supply-driven vol transitions

claim: Gold fair-value residual ($400-600/oz above real-rate model) as a monetary regime uncertainty diagnostic with leading indicator properties
needs: Precise dating of the lead relationship across more than three episodes; resolution of causal direction (gold leading vol vs common factor response with lag); higher-frequency proxy for central bank purchases to overcome 1-2 quarter reporting lag; independent agent corroboration

claim: Green metals supply inelasticity (copper deficit 2026-2028) serves as a structural vol floor
needs: Validation of the causal chain from commodity scarcity through capex uncertainty through inflation outlook to rates vol; assessment of substitution and recycling potential; independent corroboration from non-commodity analysts; stress-testing of timing coincidence with maturity wall

claim: Three-category implied-realized taxonomy (surprise / telegraphed-wrong-footed / telegraphed-correctly-positioned) as a predictive framework
needs: Expansion beyond 8-episode sample; prospective (not ex-post) classification methodology; quantitative framework for assessing positioning correctness in real-time; integration with commodity surprise sub-category

claim: OPEC+ fragmentation as a distinct source of oil volatility
needs: Self-refuted by originating agent — requires evidence that structural conditions for fragmentation have changed from the 3+ years of unfulfilled predictions; historical precedent for OPEC fragmentation in modern financial era; calibration data for the vol transmission mechanism

claim: Oil cost curve bracketing ($65-75/bbl floor, $90-100/bbl ceiling) as a vol attractor mechanism
needs: Independent agent corroboration; time-varying breakeven range calibration; modeling of OPEC+ policy interaction with the attractor band; validation of the band-narrowing hypothesis
